# Node Interface - Physical

## Filter by QoS stats

Example: ports with data

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.qos_data:iserver.output.default
```

Example: ports with drops

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.qos_drops:iserver.output.default
```

Example: ports with transmit drops

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.qos_drops_tx:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.qos_data:devel.debug
```
